mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM szzw.t_yqyc_crm_group WHERE status = '有效' AND deleted_flag = 0

SELECT p.bu_org_id AS "buOrgId", o.org_name AS "buName", p.amount AS "amount" FROM szzw.t_yqyc_biz_bu_performance p JOIN szzw.t_yqyc_sys_org o ON p.bu_org_id = o.id WHERE p.stat_month = #{month} and p.service_id = #{serviceId} ORDER BY p.amount DESC

SELECT p.service_id AS "serviceId", s.service_name AS "serviceName", COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) AS "amount" FROM szzw.t_yqyc_biz_bu_performance p JOIN szzw.t_yqyc_biz_service s ON p.service_id = s.id WHERE p.stat_month = #{month} and s.id between 1 and 9 GROUP BY p.service_id, s.service_name ORDER BY SUM(p.amount) DESC

SELECT stat_month AS "month", COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS "amount" FROM szzw.t_yqyc_biz_bu_performance WHERE stat_month LIKE #{year} || '%' and service_id = #{serviceId} GROUP BY stat_month ORDER BY stat_month
SELECT service_id AS "serviceId", COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS "amount" FROM szzw.t_yqyc_biz_bu_performance WHERE stat_month = #{month} GROUP BY service_id

SELECT stat_month AS "month", COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS "amount" FROM szzw.t_yqyc_biz_bu_performance WHERE bu_org_id = #{buOrgId} AND stat_month LIKE #{year} || '%' AND service_id = #{serviceId} GROUP BY stat_month ORDER BY stat_month

SELECT stat_month AS "month", COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS "amount" FROM szzw.t_yqyc_biz_bu_performance WHERE bu_org_id = #{buOrgId} AND service_id = #{serviceId} AND stat_month LIKE #{year} || '%' GROUP BY stat_month ORDER BY stat_month

SELECT COALESCE( (SELECT SUM(target_amount) FROM szzw.t_yqyc_biz_annual_target WHERE bu_org_id = #{buOrgId} AND target_year = #{year} AND service_id = 15), (SELECT SUM(target_amount) FROM szzw.t_yqyc_biz_annual_target WHERE bu_org_id = #{buOrgId} AND target_year = #{year} AND service_id IS NULL), 0) AS "total" FROM DUAL

SELECT stat_month AS "month", COALESCE(SUM(amount), 0) AS "amount" FROM szzw.t_yqyc_biz_bu_performance WHERE bu_org_id = #{buOrgId} AND stat_month LIKE #{year} || '%'
AND service_id IN
#{code}
GROUP BY stat_month ORDER BY stat_month

SELECT a.bu_org_id AS "buOrgId", a.bu_name AS "buName", a.amount AS "amount", COALESCE(t.target_amount, 0) AS "target", CASE WHEN COALESCE(t.target_amount, 0) > 0 THEN ROUND(a.amount * 100 / t.target_amount, 1) ELSE 0 END AS "completionRate" FROM ( SELECT p.bu_org_id, o.org_name AS bu_name, COALESCE(SUM(p.amount), 0) AS amount FROM szzw.t_yqyc_biz_bu_performance p JOIN szzw.t_yqyc_sys_org o ON p.bu_org_id = o.id WHERE p.service_id = #{serviceId} AND p.stat_month LIKE #{year} || '%' GROUP BY p.bu_org_id, o.org_name ) a LEFT JOIN ( SELECT bu_org_id, SUM(target_amount) AS target_amount FROM szzw.t_yqyc_biz_annual_target WHERE target_year = #{year} AND service_id = #{serviceId} GROUP BY bu_org_id ) t ON t.bu_org_id = a.bu_org_id ORDER BY a.amount DESC
SELECT id AS "buOrgId", org_name AS "buName" FROM szzw.t_yqyc_sys_org WHERE org_type = 'BU' AND status = '启用' ORDER BY sort_no, id
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM szzw.t_yqyc_crm_group WHERE is_key_customer = 1 AND status = '有效' AND deleted_flag = 0
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT group_id) FROM szzw.t_yqyc_biz_group_bc
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(target_amount), 0) AS "total" FROM szzw.t_yqyc_biz_annual_target WHERE target_year = #{year} AND service_id = 15
